name: NetSquid
summary: Discrete-event quantum network simulator for modeling quantum networks with timing and noise effects.

name: SeQUeNCe
summary: Open-source simulator for quantum network communication.

name: QuISP
summary: Quantum Internet Simulation Package for repeater-network studies.

name: QuNetSim
summary: Framework for simulating quantum network protocols at a higher abstraction layer.

name: QKDNetSim
summary: QKD network simulation toolkit associated with NS-3 style network simulation.

name: ETSI ISG QKD
summary: ETSI group producing specifications for quantum key distribution technologies and interfaces.

name: ITU-T Y.3803
summary: Recommendation related to QKD network key management.

name: NIST Post-Quantum Cryptography Project
summary: NIST project for standardizing post-quantum cryptographic algorithms.

name: NSA QKD and Quantum Cryptography Guidance
summary: Public cybersecurity guidance discussing limitations and deployment cautions for QKD and quantum cryptography.
